title: trisetum litorale
intro: Trisetum litorale, also known as coastal hair grass, is a perennial grass species native to the coastal areas of Australia and New Zealand. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with Trisetum litorale include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and providing antioxidant support, making it a popular choice in herbal medicine. Trisetum litorale can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
